title: Protobuf input_format_protobuf_oneof_presence duplicates rows causing LOGICAL_ERROR
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
ClickHouse Protobuf reader crashes with "Invalid number of rows in Chunk" when input_format_protobuf_oneof_presence=true a
reproduced from 25.9 version
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
CREATE TABLE string_or_string
(
`string1` String,
`string2` String
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY tuple();
insert into string_or_string values ('str1',''), ('','str2');
SELECT * FROM string_or_string
INTO OUTFILE '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/myprotos.bin'
SETTINGS format_schema_source='string',
format_schema = 'syntax = "proto3";message StringOrString {oneof string_oneof {string string1 = 1;string string2 = 42;}}',
format_schema_message_name='StringOrString'
FORMAT Protobuf;
SELECT * FROM file('myprotos.bin', Protobuf)
SETTINGS format_schema_source='string',
format_schema = 'syntax = "proto3";message StringOrString {oneof string_oneof {string string1 = 1;string string2 = 42;}}',
format_schema_message_name='StringOrString';
SELECT *
FROM file('myprotos.bin', Protobuf)
SETTINGS format_schema_source='string',
format_schema = 'syntax = "proto3";message StringOrString {oneof string_oneof {string string1 = 1;string string2 = 42;}}',
format_schema_message_name='StringOrString', input_format_protobuf_oneof_presence = true
;
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/875221ae-b46b-4f7f-b066-28fa8c7339ea
### Expected behavior
Should indicate which field of protobuf oneof was found by means of setting enum value in a special column
https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/76167
┌─string1─┬─string2─┬─string_oneof_present─┐
│ str1              │                     │ string1                                  │
│                       │ str2             │ string2                                  │
└──────────────────────.─┘
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Received exception from server (version 25.12.1):
Code: 49. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Invalid number of rows in Chunk  String(size = 2) String(size = 2) Int8(size = 4) column Int8 at position 2: expected 2, got 4: (in file/uri /var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/myprotos.bin): While executing ProtobufRowInputFormat: While executing File. (LOGICAL_ERROR)
(query: SELECT *
FROM file('myprotos.bin', Protobuf)
SETTINGS format_schema_source='string',
format_schema = 'syntax = "proto3";message StringOrString {oneof string_oneof {string string1 = 1;string string2 = 42;}}',
format_schema_message_name='StringOrString', input_format_protobuf_oneof_presence = true
;)
### Additional context
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, value FLOAT8, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value, created_at) VALUES ('test1', 1.23, NOW()), ('test2', NULL, NOW()), (NULL, 3.45, NOW());
CREATE TABLE string_or_string (string1 VARCHAR, string2 VARCHAR);
SELECT *, CASE WHEN string1 IS NOT NULL THEN 'string1' ELSE 'string2' END AS string_oneof_present FROM string_or_string;
